© 2023 / I built this with Jekyll & Hyde & help from @jeffreymoro

About

Hi there! I’m Putri, an adult language educator with passion for civic engagement, education technology and UX/UI Design. I received my master degree in Educational Linguistics from University of Pennylvania Graduate School of Education, with a focus on second language development, universal design for learning, and technology.

I am passionate in facilitating adult learners to learn language skills they need to empower them. I taught at grassroots community-based programs such as RENEW, Moder Patsala and HIAS Pennsylvania to develop and teach ESL for refugees and immigrants language instruction. I’ve also had experience working as an Program Assistant at Penn English Language Program, where I helped international high school students to immersed with American experience. In terms language assessment, I helped Indonesian adult learners to learn conversational English as well as helped them to get their IELTS score to the level in which they need to get into higher education abroad.

In terms tech, I worked at an ed-tech start-up, CoLearn, where I assisted in the development of online mobile apps delivering STEM courses for K1-K12 learners for almost three years. My passion in ed-tech does not stop in learning apps, I started a position as a Digital Humanities Project Management Assistant at Penn Price Lab in 2022, where I managed multiple projects and collaborated with the team to deployed scholarships project websites. My experience at Price Lab develops my interests in Project Management and UX/UI Design as a language educator.

If you’re interested in booking an ESL Class with me or my other work, please feel free to see the price list here or contact me at putri@upenn.edu. I also provide IDN - ENG / ENG - IDN translation for documents and abstract. My portfolio is coming soon.

Terima Kasih

Thanks for this resources that had helped me build the digital portfolio:

  • Built for Jekyll
  • Helped by Hyde
  • Developed on GitHub and hosted for free on GitHub Pages
  • Coded with Sublime Text, an amazing code editor
  • Fieldwork TESOL Educational Linguistic Course at Penn GSE, University of Pennsylvania

Have questions or suggestions? Feel free to open an issue on GitHub.

Thanks for coming!
